series_metadata.series_description: Documents relating to the application and grant or denial of an administrative license or permit to be used during the course of an Ohio Organized Crime Investigations Commission (OOCIC) task force operation. Such licenses or permits could concern radio or x-ray operator licenses.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: final expiration, renewal, or denial. ; Paper: final expiration, renewal, or denial, unless scanned and saved electronically
